title: The Top 10 Claude Code Plugins to 10x Your Next Project (June '26)
summary: Chase AI presents a video reviewing ten Claude Code plugins designed to enhance project development. The focus is on Graphify, a knowledge graph solution that addresses memory constraints in large codebases without requiring RAG, alongside nine other plugins including grill-me, Codex, claude-obsidian, and n8n MCP.
